headline: Optimus robot live at Tesla Boston Boylston Street showroom for Marathon Monday — hundreds of thousands of spectators + international broadcast; zero ad spend PR at massive scale
Electrek: Dallas/Houston robotaxi expansion 'looks like another stock pump before earnings' — small geofences, limited vehicles; skepticism growing on autonomy pace ahead of Apr 22 Q1 call
Motley Fool: 'Is Tesla stock a buy ahead of earnings?' — Q1 EPS expected $0.16 GAAP / $0.33 non-GAAP; FCF projected –$1.6B; robotaxi and Cybercab remain key catalysts for sentiment

Tesla launches unsupervised robotaxi service in Dallas and Houston — Model Y fleet, no driver or monitor in front seats; Musk reposted launch; first multi-city expansion beyond Austin (Reuters, TechCrunch, Engadget)
Tesla pushing Robotaxi features to owner cars with Spring Update — standalone Self-Driving subscription app + 'Hey Grok' xAI voice assistant rolling out to existing FSD fleet
Teslarati: Optimus Gen 3 hand and arm details revealed in new patents — new joint architecture, dexterity upgrades; production design now locked per blueprint filings
Samsung Taylor Texas fab equipment installation ceremony April 24 — 2nm AI5/AI6 chips; CEO Han Jin-man attending; yields in high-50% range; $16.5B Tesla deal on track for 2027 volume production
TD Cowen cuts Tesla PT to $490 ahead of Q1 earnings — cites robotics/autonomy competition (Unitree, BYD global push) and FSD near-miss headlines; still bull but trimming expectations
